rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, ensuring alignment between claims and evidence.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named prior work but did not map against multiple works or clearly differentiate deltas beyond one comparison.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainties regarding state-of-the-art status and causality behind improvements, providing clear points where evidence was missing.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the requested scope without any drift, covering exactly what was asked.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content were introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not annotate every change with sources and reasons; some edits were not traced.
